title: moraea edulis
intro: Moraea edulis, also known as the edible gladecress or edible moraea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea edulis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
